{{Quote|Our previous ship had to leave Tramanos in something of a hurry. We needed a ride to Shibric, and since Captain Trell was going that way, he was kind enough to offer us passage.|[[Riij Winward]], to [[Dagon Niriz]]|<ref name="SideTrip">"[[Side Trip]]"</ref>}}
'''Tramanos''' was a [[Water/Legends|watery]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located within the [[Tramanos system/Legends|Tramanos system]] of the [[Grumani sector/Legends|Spumani sector]]. Due to the large percentage of [[cyanogen]] in the moon's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], it was the site of a [[Celegian/Legends|Celegian]] colony during the [[Republic Dark Age]]. However, since the air also contained [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]], other, oxygen-breathing [[Species/Legends|species]] lived there, too, although they had to use [[Breath mask/Legends|hazard masks]]. It was visited by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Saaj Calician]].

==History==
During the [[Republic Dark Age]], Tramanos was located near the borders of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Daiman]]'s [[Daimanate|territory]] as well as the borders of [[Dyarchy]] and was the site of a [[Celegian/Legends|Celegian]] colony.<ref name="Knight Errant Gazetteer" /> The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Saaj Calician]] visited this moon during his [[Sith training|Sith apprenticeship]] at some point before or during [[1040 BBY]] and finally encountered the Celegians, a species which he had loathed since his childhood.<ref name="Knight Errant" />

Shortly after the [[Siege of Calimondretta]] in [[1032 BBY/Legends|1032 BBY]], the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Diligence (New Sith Wars)|''Diligence'']] possibly visited the moon ''en route'' to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]].<ref name="Knight Errant" />
